title: Duda expands its AI stack to bridge the gap between fast website generation and enterprise-grade security
summary: In a press release shared with TechRadar Pro, Duda shared details on the new tools and features that include vibe coding , a custom widget editor, and brief-driven site building, adding to Duda’s existing suite of AI tools.
